query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(750001, 'What does "soteriology" specifically study?', 'multiple_choice', '["The doctrine of the church","The doctrine of salvation","The doctrine of last things","The doctrine of God"]', 'The doctrine of salvation', 1),
(750001, 'The Greek term sōtēria means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Judgment","Salvation/deliverance","Creation","Wisdom"]', 'Salvation/deliverance', 2),
(750001, 'The Exodus narrative in Exodus 14-15 demonstrates:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human self-salvation","God''s mighty deliverance of His people","The rejection of Israel","The end of the covenant"]', 'God''s mighty deliverance of His people', 3),
(750001, 'According to Romans 3:21-26, righteousness comes through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Works of the law","Human effort","Faith in Christ","Religious rituals"]', 'Faith in Christ', 4),
(750001, 'The ordo salutis refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["The order of creation","The order of salvation","The order of worship","The order of Scripture"]', 'The order of salvation', 5),
(750001, 'Justification is best described as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Progressive moral improvement","The forensic declaration of righteousness","Physical healing","Church membership"]', 'The forensic declaration of righteousness', 6),
(750001, 'The Greek term dikaioō means:', 'multiple_choice', '["To sanctify","To justify","To glorify","To condemn"]', 'To justify', 7),
(750001, 'The Protestant Reformation emphasized:', 'multiple_choice', '["Salvation by works","Sola gratia, sola fide, solus Christus","Human merit","Papal authority"]', 'Sola gratia, sola fide, solus Christus', 8),
(750001, 'Sanctification refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Initial conversion","The progressive work of conforming believers to Christ","Final judgment","Church governance"]', 'The progressive work of conforming believers to Christ', 9),
(750001, 'Why is soteriology central to pastoral ministry?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is merely academic","It provides the foundation for gospel proclamation","It focuses only on church structure","It has no practical application"]', 'It provides the foundation for gospel proclamation', 10),
(750001, 'Explain the relationship between justification, sanctification, and glorification in the ordo salutis.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Justification is the initial declaration of righteousness, sanctification is the progressive work of holiness, and glorification is the final consummation of salvation', 11);
command:

(750001, 'Explain the relationship between justification, sanctification, and glorification in the ordo salutis.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Justification is the initial declaration of righteousness, sanctification is the progressive work of holiness, and glorification is the final consummation of salvation', 11);
